items.raw_excerpt: The signatories of a letter to Migri management argue that immigration plays a key role in the future growth of eastern Finland, and closing the offices will have a detrimental effect.
items.summary_en: Universities and city officials in Eastern Finland signed a letter to the Finnish Immigration Service (Migri). They say immigration is important for the region's future growth. Closing the offices will hurt the area.
items.summary_ko: 핀란드 동부 지역 대학과 시 공무원들이 이민청(Migri)에 공동 서한을 보내 사무소 폐쇄 계획에 반대했다. 이민은 동부 핀란드의 미래 성장에 핵심적인 역할을 하며, 사무소 폐쇄는 지역에 악영향을 줄 것이라고 주장했다.
items.title_en: Universities and officials oppose Migri's plan to close offices in Eastern Finland
items.title_ko: 핀란드 이민청, 동부 사무소 폐쇄에 대학·시 공무원 반발
items.title_original: Universities, city officials voice concern at Migri's plans to close offices in Eastern Finland

items.raw_excerpt: Chan Brothers Travel's new Journey Within initiative debuts with a seven-day trip to Bhutan and an eight-day trip to Japan's alpine region.
items.summary_en: Chan Brothers Travel has launched a new wellness initiative called Journey Within. The program starts with a seven-day trip to Bhutan and an eight-day trip to Japan's alpine region.
items.summary_ko: 찬브라더스 여행사가 '저니 위딘'이라는 새 웰니스 여행 프로그램을 선보였다. 부탄 7일 일정과 일본 알파인 지역 8일 일정으로 구성된다.
items.title_en: Chan Brothers Travel launches wellness trips to Bhutan and Japan
items.title_ko: 찬브라더스 여행사, 부탄과 일본 웰니스 여행 상품 출시
items.title_original: Chan Brothers Travel launches wellness-themed Journey Within experience, with trips to Bhutan and Japan

items.raw_excerpt: Jessica Marrie Carah is alleged to have transferred more than $2 million out of strata trust accounts.
items.summary_en: A former strata manager in Australia faces more than 400 fraud charges. Jessica Marrie Carah is accused of taking over $2 million from shared property trust accounts without permission. Police uncovered the scheme during a long investigation.
items.summary_ko: 호주에서 전직 공동주택 관리자가 400건이 넘는 사기 혐의로 기소됐다. 제시카 매리 카라는 공동 재산 신탁 계좌에서 200만 달러 이상을 무단 인출한 혐의를 받고 있다. 경찰은 장기 수사 끝에 이 같은 사실을 적발했다.
items.title_en: More than 400 fraud charges laid against former strata manager
items.title_ko: 전직 strata 관리인, 400건 이상 사기 혐의로 기소
items.title_original: More than 400 fraud charges laid against former strata manager

items.raw_excerpt: A top official at the National Park Service says a liner along the bottom of the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool was cut with a sharp knife or razor this month, causing damage to the foam sealant installed as part of a $16 million rehabilitation project.
items.summary_en: Someone cut the liner at the bottom of the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool with a sharp knife or razor. The damage broke the foam sealant that was part of a $16 million repair project. The National Park Service is investigating.
items.summary_ko: 국립공원청에 따르면 링컨 기념관 반사 연못 바닥 방수천이 날카로운 칼이나 면도칼로 잘렸다. 1600만 달러 규모 보수 공사의 핵심 부품인 폼 실런트가 손상됐다. 국립공원청이 수사에 나섰다.
items.title_en: Vandal cuts liner of Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool with knife
items.title_ko: 링컨 기념관 반사 연못 방수천, 누군가 칼로 그어 훼손
items.title_original: Reflecting Pool liner was cut with a sharp knife or razor, National Park Service says

items.raw_excerpt: How Strong Sisters Run Club is changing women's fitness in Visakhapatnam
items.summary_en: Strong Sisters Run Club in Visakhapatnam is helping women take up running and strength training. The club focuses on making fitness fun and accessible for women. Members say the group has changed their health and confidence.
items.summary_ko: 비사카파트남의 '스트롱 시스터즈 런 클럽'이 여성들의 달리기와 근력 운동을 돕고 있다. 이 클럽은 여성에게 운동을 재미있고 부담 없이 접근할 수 있게 만드는 데 중점을 둔다. 회원들은 이 모임이 건강과 자신감을 바꿨다고 말한다.
items.title_en: How a run club in Visakhapatnam inspires women to get fit
items.title_ko: 비사카파트남 여성 달리기 클럽, 건강한 변화 이끌어
items.title_original: How this run club in Visakhapatnam is inspiring women to take up running and strength training

items.raw_excerpt: A proposal to build an underground car park, apartments and retail spaces neighbouring the Macquarie Point stadium site "does not appear to align with the precinct plan", stadium developer says.
items.summary_en: The Hobart stadium developer says a proposal for underground parking, apartments and shops nearby does not fit the area plan. The developer does not support the plan.
items.summary_ko: 호바트 경기장 개발사가 인근에 지하 주차장과 아파트, 상업 시설을 짓는 제안이 구역 계획과 맞지 않는다고 밝혔다. 개발사는 이 제안을 지지하지 않는다는 입장이다.
items.title_en: Hobart stadium developer rejects nearby waterfront plan
items.title_ko: 호바트 경기장 개발사, 워터프론트 개발 계획 반대
items.title_original: Hobart stadium developer not supportive of waterfront precinct proposal

items.raw_excerpt: Tamil Nadu's Water Resources Department will soon streamline groundwater extraction NOC approvals by moving the process online.
items.summary_en: Tamil Nadu's Water Resources Department will put groundwater extraction permit applications online. The new system aims to make the approval process faster and simpler. Residents and businesses in the state will soon apply for permits through a digital portal.
items.summary_ko: 타밀나두주 수자원부가 지하수 채취 NOC(허가) 승인 절차를 온라인으로 전환한다. 온라인 시스템 도입으로 신청과 승인 과정이 간소화될 예정이다. 이번 조치는 주 내에서 지하수 이용 허가가 필요한 주민과 사업장에 영향을 미칠 전망이다.
items.title_en: Tamil Nadu to move groundwater extraction NOC approvals online
items.title_ko: 타밀나두주, 지하수 채취 허가 절차 온라인으로 전환
items.title_original: T.N. Water Resources Department to move groundwater extraction NOC process online

items.raw_excerpt: Com influência italiana, cenários incríveis e qualidade de vida, a cidade ao lado de Curitiba encanta moradores e visitantes.
items.summary_en: A town next to Curitiba charms residents and visitors with its Italian influence, beautiful landscapes, and high quality of life. It stands out as a hidden gem in Brazil's southern region.
items.summary_ko: 쿠리치바 옆에 자리한 작은 도시가 이탈리아 문화와 아름다운 자연경관, 높은 삶의 질로 주민과 방문객을 사로잡고 있다. 브라질 남부의 숨은 보석으로 떠오르는 곳이다.
items.title_en: A city near Curitiba blends Italian heritage, amazing scenery, and quality of life
items.title_ko: 쿠리치바 옆 작은 도시, 이탈리아 유산과 아름다운 풍경이 살기 좋은 동네를 만들다
items.title_original: Uma cidade que mistura herança italiana, paisagens incríveis e qualidade de vida ao lado de Curitiba - Estado de Minas

items.raw_excerpt: A small town west of Montreal has decided to officially recognize trees as living beings with rights of their own.
items.summary_en: A small town west of Montreal declared that trees are living beings with their own rights. The town council voted to recognize the legal personhood of trees. Locals hope the move will protect old forests from development.
items.summary_ko: 몬트리올 서쪽의 한 작은 마을이 나무를 고유한 권리를 가진 살아있는 존재로 공식 인정했다. 마을 의회는 나무의 법적 인격을 인정하는 결의안을 통과시켰다. 주민들은 이 조치가 개발로부터 오래된 숲을 보호하는 계기가 되길 바라고 있다.
items.title_en: Quebec town gives trees legal rights
items.title_ko: 퀘벡의 작은 마을, 나무에 법적 권리 부여
items.title_original: Quebec town recognizes trees as living beings with rights - CTV News

items.raw_excerpt: Festival organisers are turning to private security firms to check visitors for drugs and issue fines as local councils impose a zero-tolerance drugs policy, the NRC reported on Friday. ThinkTwice, a security firm set up by former policemen, used 11 festivals as a testing ground, and issued 250 fines last year. It will be working at least six festivals this year, the paper said. Local councils, police and the public prosecution office are happy about outsourcing police tasks to the...
items.summary_en: Dutch festival organizers hire private security to check visitors for drugs and issue fines. A firm called ThinkTwice, run by former police officers, gave 250 fines at 11 festivals last year. Local officials support outsourcing this police work.
items.summary_ko: 네덜란드 페스티벌 주최측이 민간 경비업체를 고용해 방문객 마약 검사와 벌금 부과를 맡기고 있다. 전직 경찰관들이 설립한 ThinkTwice는 작년 11개 페스티벌에서 250건의 벌금을 부과했다. 지방 당국은 이 같은 경찰 업무 외부 위탁을 긍정적으로 평가하고 있다.
items.title_en: Private security firms fine Dutch festival goers for drugs
items.title_ko: 네덜란드 페스티벌, 민간 경비업체가 마약 적발자에 벌금 부과
items.title_original: Private firms are fining Dutch festival goers caught with drugs

items.raw_excerpt: Homeless people in Wagga Wagga's Wilks Park camping area have been ordered to remove all personal belongings by July 7.
items.summary_en: Homeless people camping at Wilks Park in Wagga Wagga must remove all their belongings by July 7. A move-on order was issued for the site. Failure to comply may lead to enforcement action.
items.summary_ko: Wagga Wagga의 Wilks Park 캠핑장에 머물고 있는 노숙인들이 7월 7일까지 모든 개인 소지품을 치워야 하는 퇴거 명령을 받았다. 이 조치를 따르지 않으면 강제 집행이 이루어질 수 있다.
items.title_en: Wagga Wagga homeless told to leave camp or face enforcement action
items.title_ko: Wagga Wagga 노숙인 캠프장, 7월 7일까지 퇴거 명령
items.title_original: Wagga Wagga homeless told to leave camp or face enforcement action

items.raw_excerpt: The capital's busy weekend of cultural events will be accompanied by temperatures between 20 and 26 degrees Celsius.
items.summary_en: Southern Finland will see temperatures between 20 and 26 degrees Celsius during a busy weekend of festivals. The warm weather will accompany Helsinki Pride and other cultural events in the capital.
items.summary_ko: 핀란드 남부가 축제가 몰린 주말에 20~26도의 기온을 보이며 폭염이 예상된다. 이 더위는 헬싱키 프라이드와 수도 곳곳의 문화 행사에 참여하는 시민들을 동반할 전망이다.
items.title_en: Heatwave expected in southern Finland during weekend of festivals, Helsinki Pride parade
items.title_ko: 핀란드 남부 축제 주말 폭염 예보…헬싱키 프라이드 행진도 더위 속에
items.title_original: Heatwave expected in southern Finland during weekend of festivals, Helsinki Pride parade

items.raw_excerpt: Telangana experiences cooler temperatures after 2026 monsoon covered the entire State on June 23 and forecasts heavy rainfall with thunderstorms across several districts this week.
items.summary_en: After the 2026 monsoon covered Telangana on June 23, temperatures dropped from over 42°C to 39°C. Heavy rain with thunderstorms is forecast across several districts this week.
items.summary_ko: 2026년 장마가 6월 23일 테랑가나 전역을 덮으면서 기온이 42도에서 39도로 떨어졌다. 이번 주 여러 지역에 천둥번개를 동반한 폭우가 예보된다.
items.title_en: Telangana gets relief from over 42°C heat as monsoon arrives
items.title_ko: 장마로 테랑가나 42도 폭태 누그러졀다
items.title_original: Telangana gets relief from over 42°C, highest temperature drops to 39°C on June 25

items.raw_excerpt: A 600-metre-long freight train has derailed in the municipality of Bollebygd causing train services to be suspended between Stockholm and Gothenburg. The repair work will take around two weeks, according to the Swedish Transportation Authority.
items.summary_en: A 600-meter-long freight train derailed in Bollebygd, western Sweden. Train services between Stockholm and Gothenburg are suspended. Repairs will take about two weeks, says the Swedish Transportation Authority.
items.summary_ko: 볼레뷔그드에서 길이 600m 화물열차가 탈선했다. 스톡홀름과 예테보리를 잇는 열차 운행이 중단됐다. 스웨덴 교통청에 따르면 복구에는 약 2주가 걸릴 전망이다.
items.title_en: Freight train derails in western Sweden, disrupting Stockholm-Gothenburg rail line
items.title_ko: 스웨덴 서부서 화물열차 탈선, 스톡홀름-예테보리 구간 마비
items.title_original: Train derailment in western Sweden to cause major travel disruptions

items.raw_excerpt: How labour market is ‘divided’ between EU nationals and Swiss; an 8-year-old brings a gun to school; plus other news in our roundup this Friday.
items.summary_en: A third-grader in Selzach, canton Solothurn, brought a gun to school. Police confiscated the unloaded weapon and reported the case to youth prosecutors. An investigation is underway to find out how the child got the gun.
items.summary_ko: 졸로투른주 젤자흐의 한 초등학교 3학년 학생이 학교에 총기를 가져왔다. 경찰이 장전되지 않은 무기를 압수했으며 청소년 검찰에 사건이 보고됐다. 아이가 어떻게 총을 손에 넣었는지 조사 중이다.
items.title_en: Eight-year-old brings gun to school in Swiss town
items.title_ko: 스위스 초등생, 학교에 총기 가져와
items.title_original: Today in Switzerland: A roundup of the latest news on Friday

items.raw_excerpt: A school set up by the far right political party Forum voor Democratie has been able to get government funding despite not being able to show enough parents wanted to send their children there, the Volkskrant reported on Friday. The Renaissance school, which is opening in Almere in August, will be fully funded by the state, even though it could not reach the necessary 100 declarations of support, the paper said. Instead, the school’s backers used market research to show...
items.summary_en: A school set up by the far right Forum voor Democratie party will open in Almere in August with full government funding. It could not collect the required 100 declarations of support from parents. Instead the school used market research to qualify for the money.
items.summary_ko: 극우 정당 포럼 포르 민주크라티에(FvD)가 알메레에 설립하는 학교가 8월 개교 예정이며, 정부 지원금을 전액 받게 됐다. 필요한 학부모 지지 서명 100장을 채우지 못했지만, 시장 조사 자료를 대신 제출해 자격을 충족한 것으로 드러났다.
items.title_en: Far right party's school gets state funding without enough parent support
items.title_ko: 극우 정당이 세운 학교, 학부모 동의 부족에도 국고 지원 확보
items.title_original: FvD gets round rules to establish its own school in Almere

items.raw_excerpt: In this issue of our environmental newsletter, we find how people are using EVs with four wheels that seat multiple people and start at around $10,000; get an aerial view of methane-emitting lines criss-crossing the oilsands; and, learn why wildflower mixes aren't great for your garden.
items.summary_en: Low-speed electric vehicles that seat four and cost around $10,000 are becoming an alternative for short trips. They are not just for golf courses anymore. The article also covers methane leaks in the oilsands and tips about wildflower garden mixes.
items.summary_ko: 4인승 기준 약 1만 달러부터 시작하는 저속 전기차가 짧은 거리 이동 수단으로 주목받고 있다. 이제 골프장뿐 아니라 일반 도로에서도 볼 수 있다. 이 환경 뉴스레터는 오일샌드 지역 메탄 누출과 정원용 야생화 혼합 종자에 대한 조언도 함께 다룬다.
items.title_en: Electric golf carts hit the streets as a new low-cost EV option
items.title_ko: 골프장 전용이 아니다: 전기 카트가 도로 위 저가형 전기차 대안으로 떠오르다
items.title_original: Not just for golf courses: Electric carts are another EV option hitting the streets

items.raw_excerpt: Germany is experiencing a severe heatwave with temperatures forecast to reach 40C. Journalist and Berlin resident Rachel Loxton gives her advice on getting through it safely and comfortably.
items.summary_en: Germany is facing a severe heatwave with temperatures up to 40C. A Berlin resident shares advice on staying safe and comfortable during the extreme heat.
items.summary_ko: 독일이 최고 40도까지 오르는 심각한 폭염을 겪고 있다. 베를린에 사는 한 주민이 더위를 안전하고 쾌적하게 견디는 방법을 소개한다.
items.title_en: Tips to get through the heatwave in Germany
items.title_ko: 독일 폭염 대비 생존 꿀팁
items.title_original: How to keep your cool in Germany during the heatwave

items.raw_excerpt: Norway has a reputation for being an extremely pricey country. However, you can find some essential services and goods for free or with a small contribution.
items.summary_en: Norway is known for being very expensive. But some services and goods are free or cost very little. This article lists seven things that are cheaper in Norway.
items.summary_ko: 노르웨이는 매우 비싼 나라로 알려져 있지만, 일부 서비스와 상품은 무료이거나 아주 적은 비용으로 이용할 수 있다. 이 기사는 노르웨이가 다른 나라보다 저렴한 일곱 가지를 소개한다.
items.title_en: Seven things that are cheaper in Norway than in other countries
items.title_ko: 다른 나라보다 노르웨이가 더 싼 일곱 가지
items.title_original: Seven things that are cheaper in Norway than in other countries

items.raw_excerpt: Today's word hasn't always been associated with Norway, but instances have become increasingly common in recent years.
items.summary_en: This word-of-the-day article covers the Norwegian term 'hetebølge', which means heat wave. The word was rarely used in Norway in the past, but heat waves have become more frequent there in recent years.
items.summary_ko: 오늘의 단어로 소개된 노르웨이어 'hetebølge'는 폭염을 뜻합니다. 과거에는 노르웨이와 별로 관련 없는 단어였지만, 최근 들어 폭염이 잦아지면서 점점 더 흔히 쓰이고 있습니다.
items.title_en: Norwegian word of the day: Hetebølge
items.title_ko: 오늘의 노르웨이어: Hetebølge
items.title_original: Norwegian word of the day: Hetebølge
